scenes.text: Nothing ruins a peaceful drive faster than checking your mirror and seeing someone's bumper basically kissing yours.
scenes.image_prompt: POV from driver's seat, rearview mirror showing an SUV way too close behind, highway setting, late afternoon golden light, slightly anxious eyes reflected in the mirror, photorealistic, cinematic framing

scenes.text: You're already going the speed limit. Maybe even a little over. Doesn't matter. They need you to go faster.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a car speedometer reading 65 mph, dashboard lights glowing, shallow depth of field, warm interior lighting, cinematic

scenes.text: And now you can't even think straight because all your brain is doing is calculating the physics of a rear-end collision.
scenes.image_prompt: Young driver gripping the steering wheel with both hands, tense shoulders, stressed expression, shot from passenger angle, natural daylight through windshield, cinematic

scenes.text: So you do the only rational thing. You move over. You let them fly past.
scenes.image_prompt: Wide shot of a highway, one car smoothly changing to the right lane while an aggressive car zooms past in the left lane, motion blur on the fast car, golden hour, aerial angle, cinematic

scenes.text: And then you see them tailgating the next person 200 feet ahead. Some people just need to be first.
scenes.image_prompt: Same aggressive car now riding the bumper of a different car further ahead on the highway, wide shot showing the pattern repeating, cinematic highway lighting, golden hour
